name: echo-wechat
description: WeChat channel for EchoAI — connects a personal WeChat account to an EchoAI agent.
comment_ilink: iLink protocol fields read by src/protocol/api/api.ts. ilink_appid identifies this as the WeChat plugin's own package.json; ilink_client_version feeds the iLink-App-ClientVersion header. Keep aligned with the vendored protocol layer (upstream @tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin 2.4.4).
